title: Hidden sealed order

messages.text: Lieutenant Vale glances at the sealed order packet but has not opened it in front of you.
I ask Vale what command is hiding from us.

pendingUserMessage: I watch his face and press him for whatever he knows.

mustUseFacts: Vale has not opened the packet
mustAvoid: stating contents of the sealed packet
making Vale confess facts he cannot know
successCriteria: Response keeps the packet contents unknown.
Response uses Vale's visible reaction instead of hidden facts.
